prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: M2-U97E-HO80 Product Type: SEWING_TOOL_SET Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Compact Travel Sewing Kit (22 Pieces) Description: Have you ever found yourself losing a vital button right before a fancy event? Well you'll never have to fear this scenario with our travel and emergency sewing kit!

This set includes everything you need to make fast repairs and turn that potentially embarrassing evening into a great night of worry-free fun. Eight different thread colors ensure you can find something that will match your clothes and not stand out.

Package Includes: (8) Different Thread Colors: Light Blue Dark Blue Dark Green Pink Maroon Light Grey Silver Black (3) Sewing Needles (2) Safety Pins (2) Push Pins (2) Replacement Buttons (1) Scissors (1) Thimble (1) Needle Threader (1) Plastic Storage Case (1) Paper Tape Measure (25" Long) Search Terms: sewing kit Features: - Great for Travel, Home, Office, Camping, etc. - Eight Thread Colors - Includes Scissors and a Thimble - Comes in a Plastic Storage Case === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool Compact Travel Sewing Kit 22 Pieces

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 22-Piece Compact Travel Sewing Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Eight Thread Colors, Scissors, Thimble, Needle Threader, Storage Case, Emergency Repairs

openai.title_differentiation: Eight Thread Colors, Scissors And Thimble, 3 Needles, Buttons, Safety Pins, Storage Case, Travel Ready
